text:
“Temporary roadblock” means any structure, device or means used by police officers to control traffic at a place on a highway whereby vehicles may be slowed or stopped:

(1) To identify the occupants of those vehicles; or

(2) Because of the existence of an emergency.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484B
##### § 484B.070 — “Temporary roadblock” defined.

“Temporary roadblock” means any structure, device or means used by police officers to control traffic at a place on a highway whereby vehicles may be slowed or stopped:

(1) To identify the occupants of those vehicles; or

(2) Because of the existence of an emergency.

subsections.text: “Temporary roadblock” means any structure, device or means used by police officers to control traffic at a place on a highway whereby vehicles may be slowed or stopped:
To identify the occupants of those vehicles; or
Because of the existence of an emergency.
